    • Method Detail

      • getImage

        public static Image getImage(String s)

      • createImageIcon

        public static ImageIcon createImageIcon(Object o,
                                        String filename)
        Creates an icon from an image contained in a resource. The resource is fist search using the package name of the calling Object and if it is not found there the package name of its superclass is used recursively.
        Parameters:
        o - the Object reference to the calling object
        filename - String the name of the file to search (only relative pathname to the path of the calling class)
        Returns:
        the newly created image

      • createImageIcon

        public static ImageIcon createImageIcon(Class<?> cl,
                                        String filename)
        Creates an icon from an image contained in a resource. The resource is fist search using the package name of the given class and if the resource is not found the packagename of its superclass is used recursively.
        Parameters:
        cl - the Class the resource is looked for
        filename - String the name of the file to search (only relative pathname to the path of the calling class)
        Returns:
        the newly created image

      • scaleIcon

        public static ImageIcon scaleIcon(Image im,
                                  int x,
